headline: Richemont Sales Surge 10% on Cartier Demand

article.title: Richemont Sales Up on Resilient Cartier Jewelry Demand
article.summary: Richemont’s full-year sales rose more than expected as shoppers splurged on its pricey Cartier jewelry. article.title: CVC, GBL Offer to Acquire Italy’s Recordati in $12 Billion Deal
article.summary: CVC Capital Partners Plc and Groupe Bruxelles Lambert offered to buy Recordati SpA in a deal valuing the Italian drugmaker at more than $12 billion, which would be one of the biggest healthcare deals in Europe this year.
